vitals.location: Belgrade, Serbia (one-off 2017 event; no current edition — see eligibility)
vitals.date: Last held: October 1, 2017 — no current edition
vitals.entry_fee: EUR30 advance, EUR40 at final registration window (2017)

fondo_rating.scoring_notes: Migrated from gravel-race-automation. Original score: 66. adventure dimension dropped, road_surface added. Score recalculated: 63. FLAG (2026-07-24 editorial wave 7): confirmed one-off — only edition ever evidenced was October 1, 2017 (Skyline GranFondo Belgrade), field ~450-500, not the 1,500-2,000 previously claimed. organization=3, field_depth=2, prestige=3 and other dimensions were scored as if this were a recurring active event; recommend a human re-check whether a one-off 2017 race should carry an active-style score at all. Numbers left untouched per no-silent-reshuffle rule.

course_description.character: Skyline GranFondo Belgrade started and finished at Terazije in central Belgrade, with the long route traveling out to the Kosmaj area and back. Contemporary route descriptions also mention Trešnja as part of the climbing. No evidence has been found of any edition after the single October 1, 2017 running.
course_description.signature_challenge: The Kosmaj climbing zone reached on the long (126 km) route's out-and-back from central Belgrade.
suffering_zones: Kosmaj — the principal climbing area on the 2017 long route
Trešnja — mentioned in contemporary route descriptions alongside Kosmaj

logistics.lodging_strategy: Abundant hotels in Belgrade city center; book early for race weekend near start/finish.

history.origin_story: Serbia's first advertised gran fondo, held October 1, 2017, marketed as launching Belgrade into the world cycling map. Organized by Bike Tailors d.o.o. with federation and public-authority support, drawing roughly 450-500 riders from 16-17 countries.
notable_moments: 2017: Sole confirmed edition, October 1, ~450-500 riders from 16-17 countries

biased_opinion.summary: Skyline GranFondo Belgrade ran exactly once, on October 1, 2017 — a genuinely international launch (roughly 450-500 riders from 16-17 countries) with a credible 126 km/75 km/kids-ride structure starting and finishing at Terazije in central Belgrade. No evidence of a second edition, a formal cancellation notice, or any successor event under this name has been found; current Serbian and Belgrade cycling federation calendars list nothing matching it. This is a different event from the currently active Gran Fondo Novi Sad, which runs in a different city with its own routes around Fruška Gora.
strengths: A surprisingly international inaugural field (450-500 riders, 16-17 countries) for a first-year event
Central-city start at Terazije with a credible 126 km road course and a shorter 75 km option
Federation and public-authority support at launch lent it real institutional backing
weaknesses: No evidence of continuity beyond the single 2017 edition — not currently bookable
No surviving official event site or results archive
Sparse course documentation beyond the 2017 launch coverage
Easily confused with the currently active Gran Fondo Novi Sad, a genuinely different event in a different city
biased_opinion.bottom_line: Treat this as a one-time 2017 event with no confirmed successor. If you want an active Serbian gran fondo, look at Gran Fondo Novi Sad instead.

final_verdict.one_liner: Serbia's first gran fondo ran once in 2017 (Terazije to Kosmaj) with no evidence of a return since.
final_verdict.should_you_race: No — there is no current edition to register for, and no evidence of one since 2017.
final_verdict.alternatives: For a currently active Serbian gran fondo, see Gran Fondo Novi Sad — a distinct event in a different city.

videos.title: Skyline GranFONDO Belgrade 2017
videos.description:
Želeli smo da započnemo novu tradiciju i upišemo Beograd​ u biciklističku mapu sveta. Uspeli smo, a u tome nam je pomoglo čak 487 biciklista, 20 fotografa, 35 volontera, preko 100 ljudi iz organizacije i još više onih koji su nas bodrili i podržavali! 

Učestvovanjem u prvoj Skyline GranFondo Belgrade trci u Srbiji zajedno smo postali deo biciklističke istorije koja će se SIGURNO ponoviti!

video credits: Skyoptic - Snimanje iz vazduha​ www.snimanje.rs & Soultime Media​

Epic Music Mania. "Finger Music - Ultra (Epic Intense Hybrid 
           Action)" YouTube. YouTube, 04 July 2015. Web. 
           05 August 2016.
videos.curation_reason: Highest-viewed video specifically about the Belgrade Gran Fondo with aerial footage and race highlights.

eligibility.notes: last evidence 2017 (Skyline GranFondo Belgrade); absent from current calendars; low-confidence defunct — distinct from Gran Fondo Novi Sad. UPDATED (2026-07-24, codex gpt-5.6-sol): confidence raised — confirmed sole edition was October 1, 2017 (Skyline GranFondo Belgrade), ~450-500 riders from 16-17 countries; Serbian and Belgrade Cycling Federation calendars confirm no successor event; distinct from the currently active Gran Fondo Novi Sad.

catalog_flags.status_note: One-off event: only edition ever evidenced was October 1, 2017. No cancellation notice found, but no successor edition either — presumed defunct with raised confidence this wave. Distinct from the currently active Gran Fondo Novi Sad.
